title: Federated Learning, Round by Round
tagline: Train a model across clients that never share data — and watch non-IID drift wreck FedAvg
summary: Six clients with different local label distributions train a shared classifier via FedAvg. Slide the non-IID strength and see global accuracy collapse; switch to FedProx and watch it stabilise. Communication-rounds-vs-accuracy curve; per-client weight drift; secure-aggregation and DP commentary.
highlights: Six clients with per-client non-IID label skew; live FedAvg rounds in your browser.
Non-IID slider: IID → label-skewed → single-class-per-client; watch global accuracy fail.
FedProx vs FedAvg toggle: proximal term tames drift on non-IID clients.
